products.name: Pure Marine Collagen 1200mg 120 Capsules
tags: Skin and Nail Vitamins and Supplements
products.descriptionText:
What Are Pure Marine Collagen Capsules?
Are you looking for a natural solution for your ageing skin? Collagen is the new buzzword in the skincare industry, and might be exactly what you are looking for!
Our Pure Marine Collagen Capsules provide high-absorbing hydrolysed Type 1 and Type 3 Titagen collagen , the two most useful forms of collagen found in your body. Packed with a potent 1200mg of fish collagen peptides per serving, our Marine Collagen Capsules help replenish your body’s natural collagen levels, which is an essential component of your skin, joints, bones and more.
Let your body harness the collagen glow with our Pure Marine Collagen Capsules.
Benefits of Pure Marine Collagen Capsules
Collagen makes up around 30% of the proteins in our body, but as we age, our body’s ability to produce collagen starts declining. Decreasing collagen levels gives rise to evident symptoms such as joint pain, thinning hair, brittle bones and signs of premature ageing.
That’s when collagen supplements come to the rescue! Here's how our Pure Marine Collagen Capsules benefit you:
Advanced hydrolysed Type I and III collagen , the two types which make up about 90% of your body's total collagen.
Helps restore your declining collagen levels found in skin and joints.
Collagen is present in the hair, scalp and is, therefore, needed for your hair .
Offers hydrolysed collagen peptides to ensure better absorption
Why Choose Our Pure Marine Collagen Capsules?
Made with 20+ years of expertise, with expertly developed wellness supplements and devices.
Offers both Type 1 and Type 3 collagen , unlike regular collagen supplements that only contain Type 1 collagen.
Naturally sourced Titagen collagen from fish scales and hydrolysed for better absorption .
Free from GMOs, Magnesium stearate and artificial additives for reliable consumption.
Third-party lab-tested for heavy metals and contaminants to ensure purity and nothing else.
Just 2 capsules a day - offering you 2 months’ uninterrupted supply.
Gluten-free formula , perfect for those with gluten intolerance.
Unflavoured and odourless capsules with no fishy or bitter aftertaste for convenient intake.
Packed in recyclable PET bottles to lower our carbon footprint and be a more sustainable choice.
Backed by our 90-day money-back guarantee, helping you try these capsules risk-free.

products.name: Ashwagandha Extract (KSM-66) 1500mg 180 Tablets
tags: Skin and Nail Vitamins and Supplements
products.descriptionText:
What Are Our Ashwagandha KSM-66 Tablets?
Feeling mentally drained or off balance lately? Ashwagandha has long been valued in Ayurvedic and Unani practices for its adaptogenic properties. That's why we bring you our Ashwagandha KSM-66 Tablets - a convenient way to enjoy this beneficial plant without tolerating its bitter taste!
Each tablet delivers a high-strength 1500mg dose from a concentrated 10:1 ashwagandha extract, packed in a vegan-friendly formula that’s gentle on the stomach. With 180 tablets per bottle, you are sorted for six months - no frequent reordering hassles . Make the first step towards a balanced you with ashwagandha today!
Benefits of Ashwagandha KSM-66
WeightWorld’s Ashwagandha Tablets offer you all the incredible benefits that Withania Somnifera (ashwagandha) provides. Ashwagandha:
Contains phytochemicals like withanolides known to be an adaptogen
Is rich in iron, which contributes to the normal function of the immune system and the reduction of tiredness and fatigue
Iron contributes to normal cognitive function
Is a source of calcium, which is needed for the maintenance of normal bones and contributes to normal muscle function
Offers the benefits of dietary fibre
Which Is Better: KSM-66 or Regular Ashwagandha Tablets?
Unlike regular ashwagandha supplements which use both leaf extract and root extract, KSM-66 ashwagandha supplements are made using only ashwagandha root extracts, which offer the highest concentration of full-spectrum beneficial compounds.
KSM-66 has superior bioavailability, meaning your body absorbs it more efficiently than regular ashwagandha tablets. So, there's no doubt why many refer to KSM-66 as the 'gold standard' ashwagandha.
Why Choose WeightWorld Ashwagandha KSM-66 Tablets?
While there are many ashwagandha supplements on the market, many of them fail to deliver the results they claim. Here's why our Ashwagandha KSM-66 Tablets are the right choice for you:
Formulated with 18+ years of industry experience by WeightWorld experts
1500mg dose of Ashwagandha KSM-66 in each tablet, one of the highest potencies among competitors on the market
Made with 100% natural and non-GMO ingredients causing no known harmful side effects
Taste-free tablets , no bitter taste as is experienced while taking raw ashwagandha
Vegan tablet, perfect for vegans and vegetarians
Gluten-free formula so you can have it safely even if you have gluten intolerance
GMP-certified to ensure reliable use by you and your loved ones
Each bottle offers an uninterrupted 6-month supply , while most others offer only 2 to 3 months' supply
Comes with a 90-day money-back guarantee so that you can enjoy it risk-free

products.name: Magnesium Glycinate 1420mg 180 Capsules
products.descriptionText:
What Are Our Magnesium Glycinate Capsules?
Are low energy and restlessness holding you back? Magnesium can be your saviour. Try out our Magnesium Glycinate Capsules today!
Magnesium is an essential mineral for everyone, and while we can consume it through foods, it can be tough for some people to get the optimal dose of magnesium due to dietary restrictions. Each serving of our Magnesium Glycinate Capsules provides 1420mg of magnesium glycinate , offering 200mg of elemental magnesium.
For added benefits and to complement the mighty mineral magnesium, we have added 2mg of vitamin B6 to make a powerful combination not found in most magnesium bisglycinate supplements. You get 180 capsules in one bottle for an uninterrupted 3-month supply , so you can reap the benefits effortlessly!
Benefits of Magnesium Glycinate Capsules
Our magnesium supplement contains the max-absorbing form of magnesium, magnesium bisglycinate, so your body can absorb it better and feel the effects. Here’s how the ingredients in our Magnesium Glycinate Capsules benefit you:
Magnesium and vitamin B6 contribute to normal energy-yielding metabolism*
Magnesium contributes to normal muscle function*
Magnesium contributes to normal protein synthesis*
Magnesium contributes to the maintenance of normal bones and teeth*
Magnesium contributes to electrolyte balance*
Magnesium and vitamin B6 contribute to a reduction of tiredness and fatigue*
Magnesium and vitamin B6 contribute to normal functioning of the nervous system*
Magnesium and vitamin B6 contribute to normal psychological function*
Vitamin B6 contributes to the normal function of the immune system*
Vitamin B6 contributes to the regulation of hormonal activity*
Vitamin B6 contributes to normal protein and glycogen metabolism*
Vitamin B6 contributes to normal red blood cell formation*
Why Choose Our Magnesium Glycinate Capsules?
Here’s why our Magnesium Glycinate Capsules stand out from the rest of the magnesium tablets on the market -
Formulated with 20+ years of industry experience in making 150+ wellness supplements and devices
Each serving contains a potent 1420mg of magnesium glycinate and 2mg of vitamin B6 , a pair carefully made for complementary benefits
Each bottle has 180 capsules, so you get a long-lasting 3-month supply , more than what most competitors' magnesium tablets offer
Just need to take 2 easy-to-swallow capsules a day for a convenient dose of wellness without any bitter taste, unlike other magnesium tablets
A vegan-friendly formulation free from magnesium stearate, additives and harmful GMOs , ensuring you get only premium-grade magnesium
Made in the UK and packed in recyclable bottles to reduce carbon footprint and be a more sustainable choice for you
100% natural and GMP-certified formula , offering you the WeightWorld reliability
Backed by our 90-day money-back guarantee , helping you try these capsules risk-free
*These health claims are authorised by the European Food Safety Authority.

Why Choose Our Multivitamins And Minerals Tablets?
While there are many multivitamin supplements on the market, not all are made equal. Here’s what makes our Multivitamins and Minerals Tablets outshine the rest!
A revolutionary formula consisting of 27 vitamins and minerals in each tablet, a combination that is rare to find elsewhere

Normal absorption/ utilisation of calcium and phosphorus*

Maintenance of normal teeth*
Normal function of the immune system*
Has a role in the process of cell division*
EFSA has also researched the benefits of vitamin K and states that it contributes to:
Normal blood clotting*
The maintenance of normal bones*

4000IU of vitamin D3 and 125µg of K2 MK7 in one tablet ; no need to take multiple vitamin tablets in a day

Do you feel conscious about thinning hair or ageing skin? Then try our Biotin Tablets today!
Biotin is a water-soluble B complex vitamin that is essential for our hair, skin, nails, and overall wellness. Our unique biotin supplement provides a high-strength 12,000µg of pure biotin in every serving.
Made for everyday ease, our vegan tablets offer a fuss-free way to stay consistent with your routine. Instead of relying on complex routines or expensive treatments, our biotin tablets offer a convenient way to top up your body's natural vitamin B7 levels and support your well-being from within.
With 365 tablets per bottle, you can enjoy the biotin benefits for a whole year without worrying about reordering.

products.name: Multivitamin Gummies for Women 90 Gummies
products.descriptionText:
What Are Our Multivitamin Gummies for Women?
Did you know roughly 70% of women across the world are multivitamin deficient? Are you sure you aren’t one of them? Although we get multivitamins from our foods, it’s important to understand that women have unique multivitamin requirements compared to men.
So, you need a multivitamin supplement that specifically caters to women’s health needs. That’s why we introduced our Multivitamin Gummies for Women!
Unlike regular multivitamin supplements, our women’s Multivitamin Gummies pack all the vital vitamins, minerals, fatty acids and compounds that are recommended for female wellness.
Here’s the best part! Our easy-to-chew gummies come in a fruity Strawberry & Raspberry flavour , making your multivitamin dose a daily treat, not a chore! So, don’t compromise on your daily needs and give yourself the care you deserve with our Multivitamin Gummies for Women!
How Do Our Multivitamin Gummies Benefit Women?
While we already know multivitamins are important for our bodies, let’s find out how the powerful nutrients in our Multivitamin Gummies help you tick your well-being and beauty goals!
Iodine contributes to the normal production of thyroid hormones
Vitamin B6 contributes to the regulation of hormonal activity.
Vitamin A, biotin (B7), iodine and zinc contribute to the maintenance of normal skin
Biotin (B7) and zinc contribute to the maintenance of normal hair
Vitamin C contributes to the normal collagen formation for the normal function of bones, gums, teeth, skin and blood vessels
Vitamins A, B6, B12 and C, folate (B9) and zinc contribute to the normal function of the immune system
Vitamins B6, B12, C and folate (B9) contribute to the reduction of tiredness and fatigue
Vitamins B6, B12 and C, biotin (B7), calcium and iodine contribute to normal energy-yielding metabolism
Calcium is needed for the maintenance of normal bones and teeth and contributes to normal muscle function
Vitamins B6, B12 and C, folate (B9) and biotin (B7) contribute to normal psychological function
Vitamins B6 and C and biotin (B7) contribute to the normal functioning of the nervous system
Vitamin A and zinc contribute to the maintenance of normal vision
Iodine and zinc contribute to normal cognitive function
Coenzyme Q10 is found in almost every cell of the body and is a powerful oxidant, which may help with energy and youthful skin
Hyaluronic acid acts as a hydrating agent for the skin and is naturally found in the joints as a lubricant to maintain joint mobility
Evening primrose oil contains gamma-linolenic acid (GLA) , which is an omega-6 essential fatty acid
Why Choose Our Multivitamin Gummies for Women?
While there are many multivitamin supplements available on the market, here’s what makes our Multivitamin Gummies for Women stand out from the rest!
Advanced Formula
Power-packed with 10 vitamins and minerals plus HLA, Coenzyme Q10 and omega-rich Evening Primrose Oil - a revolutionary formula hard to find elsewhere.
Tablets? Nay! Gummies? Yay!
Our Strawberry- and Raspberry-flavoured gummies offer you a tasty and easy-to-chew way to get all the essential nutrients, unlike bitter and hard-to-swallow multivitamin tablets.
Low in Sugar, Not Sweetness
Although our gummies have a sweet, fruity taste to tantalise your taste buds, their low sugar content takes away all the negatives of a sweet treat.
Say No To Side Effects
Unlike chemical-laden tablets, our gummies are all-natural and free from GMOs, gluten and artificial additives, making sure you face no known harmful side effects while enjoying the benefits.
Enjoy Higher Supply Than Others
With 90 gummies per pack, you get an uninterrupted 1.5-month supply, higher than what other multivitamin gummy supplements offer.
100% Satisfaction Guarantee
We offer you a 90-day full money-back guarantee so you can try our gummies risk-free!
Who Are Our Women's Multivitamin Gummies Indicated for?
Our Women's Multivitamin Gummies are:
Perfect for women seeking all-around wellness and vitality.
Designed to complement women’s monthly cycles with essential nutrients.
Excellent for those looking to reduce feelings of tiredness and fatigue.
Perfect for women wanting a convenient and effective daily supplement.
Great for busy lifestyles, with a 1.5-month supply of premium gummies.

Why Choose Our Iron Gummies for Kids with Vitamin C?

Offers an optimal dosage of 7mg of pure iron per serving to keep iron deficiency at bay
Our Iron Gummies for Kids are enriched with 10mg of vitamin C (L-ascorbic acid) for better absorption of iron into your body

What Are Our Vitamin C and Zinc Tablets?
Looking for a way to support your inner defences, vitality and overall wellness? Try our Vitamin C and Zinc Tablets today!
Both vitamin C and zinc are essential nutrients for many biological processes, but with busy schedules, it can be tough to consume optimal amounts of both as part of your daily diet. Each serving of our tablets offers 1000mg of vitamin C with 10mg of zinc , giving you a balanced blend of these two nutrients.
With 180 tablets per bottle, and an effortless 1-a-day dose, you get a massive 6-month supply in one go. They are also vegan and free from GMOs and magnesium stearate-free. So, get yours today and experience the benefits yourself!

Why Choose Our Vitamin C and Zinc Tablets?

Made with 20+ years of experience in making premium wellness supplements and devices

products.name: Berberine 500mg 120 Capsules
products.descriptionText:
What Are Our Berberine Capsules?
Berberine is a bitter-tasting bioactive compound and has been used for centuries in
traditional Chinese and Ayurvedic practices due to its powerful wellness benefits.
While it is found in some plants like European barberry, Oregon grape and goldenseal, it may be tough for you to include these in your daily diet.
That's why we formulated our taste-free, ready-to-take Berberine Capsules so you can get the benefits without any hassle.
Our Berberine Capsules are made from premium-grade, vegan berberine hydrochloride .
Each capsule contains a potent 500mg dose of pure berberine .
Just take 1 capsule a day , and with 120 capsules in a bottle , enjoy a 4-month uninterrupted supply .
Benefits of Our Berberine Capsules
Berberine hydrochloride, or berberine HCL, is the most well-researched form of berberine.
Here are some of the key benefits you get when you incorporate our Berberine Capsules into your daily diet:
Berberine helps to reduce blood triglyceride levels *
Offers berberine benefits in its highly soluble HCL form so your body can absorb better
Our Berberine Capsules are suitable for keto diet , complementing your keto diet goals
Why Choose Our Berberine Capsules?
WeightWorld is a trusted name when it comes to delivering high-quality, effective products.
Here's why our Berberine Capsules stand out:
Formulated with 19+ years of industry experience in making 150+ wellness supplements and devices
Each capsule delivers a strong dose of 500mg of berberine , containing the benefits of 98% natural alkaloid
Our capsules are vegan, gluten-free and keto-friendly , making them an ideal choice for people with varying dietary restrictions
Unlike many other supplements, our Berberine Capsules are clean, natural options containing no artificial flavourings or sweeteners
You just need one easy-to-swallow capsule per day , so you get a 4-month uninterrupted supply without reordering hassles
GMP-certified and free from GMOs to offer you the WeightWorld reliability
100% natural and free from magnesium stearate , allowing you to enjoy the benefits without experiencing any known side effects
Backed by a 100% money-back guarantee within 90 days, so you can try the capsules risk-free
*Please note that this health claim is pending approval by EFSA.

products.name: Glucosamine and Chondroitin 180 Capsules
tags: Skin and Nail Vitamins and Supplements
products.descriptionText:
What Are Our Glucosamine, Chondroitin & MSM Capsules?
Do you want to naturally top up your glucosamine and chondroitin levels? Try our Glucosamine, Chondroitin & MSM Capsules!
Each two-capsule serving contains 1000mg of glucosamine, 200mg of chondroitin, vitamin C, hyaluronic acid, MSM, and organic turmeric root powder, providing a high-strength blend designed to give your body benefits beyond a regular joint supplement.
With 180 easy-to-swallow capsules, a single bottle provides a supply that lasts for several months, eliminating the need for frequent reordering. Feel the magic of our glucosamine and chondroitin supplement today!
Benefits of Glucosamine, Chondroitin & MSM Capsules
Glucosamine and chondroitin are vital compounds found naturally throughout the body in your joints. As we age, the natural production of these compounds starts declining. That's where our Glucosamine & Chondroitin Complex Capsules come to the rescue! Here's how the key ingredients in our capsules benefit you -
Help replenish the natural levels of glucosamine and chondroitin in the body
Vitamin C contributes to normal collagen formation for the normal function of bones, cartilage, gums, teeth, and skin*
Turmeric is naturally rich in manganese, which contributes to the maintenance of normal bones*
Manganese contributes to normal energy-yielding metabolism*
Manganese contributes to the normal formation of connective tissue*
Added goodness of powerhouse natural ingredients like hyaluronic acid and MSM
Why Choose Our Glucosamine, Chondroitin & MSM Capsules?
Here’s why our Glucosamine Complex Capsules stand out from other supplements on the market -
Formulated with 19+ years of industry experience in making 150+ wellness supplements and devices
Each serving offers high-strength 1200mg of glucosamine and chondroitin per two capsules
Packs a unique blend of vitamin C, turmeric, hyaluronic acid, and MSM, a revolutionary formula hard to find in regular glucosamine supplements
Our capsules are free from gluten, harmful GMOs & magnesium stearate, so you can have them worry-free
Just need to take 1 to 2 easy-to-swallow capsules a day, offering up to six months of uninterrupted supply
Made in the EU and packaged in recyclable PET bottles, making them a smart choice for you and the environment
Our supplement is GMP-certified to offer you the WeightWorld reliability
Backed by a 90-day money-back guarantee, so you can try the capsules risk-free
*These health claims are authorised by the European Food Safety Authority.
